name: timers

apis.name: setTimeout(callback[, delay[, ...args]])
apis.notes: Schedules a one-shot callback through JROC's Node event loop and returns a refreshable Timeout handle.

apis.name: clearTimeout(timeout)
apis.notes: Cancels an active Timeout handle. Repeated cleanup is safe.

apis.name: timeout.refresh()
apis.notes: Restarts an active or completed one-shot timeout using its original delay and returns the same handle.

notes: Both `timers` and `node:timers` resolve to this module. This focused implementation provides the timeout APIs required by Undici's snapshot recorder; immediate and interval module exports are not yet implemented.
